name: all-mail
description: all-Mail repository-level CLI and npm deployment scripts

scripts.install:all: npm run install:server && npm run install:web
scripts.build:server: npm --prefix server run db:generate && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.build:web: npm --prefix web run build && node scripts/prepare-public.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.deploy:npm: npm run build && npm run start:npm
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix web run lint
scripts.test: npm run test:runtime && npm --prefix server run test
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm --prefix web run build && npm --prefix cloudflare/workers/allmail-edge run check
